CONTENT.Career: Arboleda made his debut for Deportivo Cali in the Categoría Primera A on 12 February 2015. He has later played for four other clubs in the Colombian top division, namely Patriotas Boyacá, América de Cali, La Equidad and Deportivo Pasto.On 1 February 2021, Arboleda signed for Moldovan National Division club Sheriff Tiraspol.On 24 February 2024, Arboleda signed with Chinese Super League club Wuhan Three Towns.
CONTENT.Honours: Al AinUAE Pro League: 2021–22UAE League Cup: 2021–22
CONTENT.External links: Danilo Arboleda at Global Sports Archive

SUMMARY: Danilo Arboleda Hurtado (born 16 May 1995) is a Colombian footballer who plays as a defender for Chinese Super League club Wuhan Three Towns.
